title: 有馬記念の後に・その姿は

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And first place goes to Hishi Amazon! What a
truly powerful force to be reckoned with!
Wooooo!

Hishi Amazon zips across the finish line, coming in
like a beam of light. The audience erupts with a
raucous cheer.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Did you see that?! What an incredible feat!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
And that goes for Hishi Amazon and Narita Brian
both!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... We truly witnessed them for who they
are...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon, the Queen of the Amazons, and
Narita Brian, the Beast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I've done it... I've won?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ama...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. Congrats.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! Yeeeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Hishi Amazon!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: And welcome back, Narita Brian!

Applause roars through the stands of the
Nakayama Racecourse, drowning out the words
of encouragement from the racers' fans.

Seeing everyone so fiercely captivated, I'm
reminded once again...
Narita Brian really is a beast in her own right.
On the way back from the race...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I want to thank you, Ama.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? That came outta nowhere. Are you thanking
me 'cause I lent you my handkerchief back in the
restroom?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm not talking about that, you dope.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm talking about the Arima Kinen. You did a
good job back there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That was an impressive finish you made.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What's gotten into you all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to compete with you again. Or have a
"one-on-one," to use your lingo.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wha—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You have... a passion about you. It makes me feel
like I'm on fire, and makes my heart burn.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That white-hot fire of yours makes me want to
devour everything and everyone in my path.

There's a fierce spark in Narita Brian's eyes as she
looks at Hishi Amazon, bathed in the setting sun's
orange glow.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I can really sense that beast inside you, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh, nothing. Just talking to myself.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll gladly accept that challenge of yours, Narita
Brian. I won't hold back on the next one.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter how many times we clash! I'll
come out on top, every time!

And so... their second battle at the Arima Kinen
draws to a close.
